title: Bhuvaneśvarī Sādhana
description: The fourth of the Daśa Mahāvidyās, Bhuvaneśvarī ("Mistress of the World") is the Goddess as the sovereign of all existence — she whose body is the *bhuvana* (cosmos). Three-eyed, four-armed, holding the *pāśa* (noose) and the *aṅkuśa* (goad), she is the *māyā-śakti* by which the universe is woven. Attested in the *Śāradā Tilaka*, *Bhuvaneśvarī Tantra*, *Bhuvaneśvarī-Aṣṭakam* of the *Rudrayāmala*,
